message:
test(web): add tests for transcript, history client, status service (batch 7)

- transcript/utils: 42 tests (formatTime, formatDuration, detectLanguage,
  formatFilePath, formatBytes, estimateTokens, formatNumber)
- transcript/processor: 35 tests (processTranscript, parseEntry, section
  detection, getToolCallSummary, getMessageAction)
- history/client: 20 tests (getOrCreateLocalUserId, trackHistoryView with
  deduplication, listHistory filtering, clearHistoryForUser)
- status/status-service: 16 tests (getStatusSummary, getQuickStatus,
  getComponentStatus with mocked health checks + incident store)

Total: 113 new tests. Suite: 75 files, 2236 tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
